11:[["$","h1",null,{"children":"Working Memory"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"The agent's immediate context — recent observations, active conversations, and current tool results. Fastest access, limited capacity, and subject to eviction."}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Schema",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":["| Column | Type | Description |\n|--------|------|-------------|\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"id"}]," | TEXT | UUIDv4 primary key |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"content"}]," | TEXT | Raw memory content |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"embedding"}]," | BLOB | Vector embedding (1536 dims) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tags"}]," | TEXT | JSON array of tags |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"importance"}]," | REAL | 0.0–1.0 importance score |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"source"}]," | TEXT | Origin (user, tool, observation) |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"created_at"}]," | INTEGER | Unix timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"accessed_at"}]," | INTEGER | Last access timestamp |\n| ",["$","code",null,{"children":"access_count"}]," | INTEGER | Read frequency |"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["FTS5 Triggers",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"SQLite FTS5 indices are maintained automatically via triggers:"}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{"language":"sql"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Eviction Policy",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"When Working Memory reaches capacity, entries are evicted by:"}],"\n",["$","ol",null,{"children":["\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Importance weighting"}],": Higher importance = lower eviction priority"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Recency"}],": Recently accessed entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Access frequency"}],": Frequently read entries are protected"]}],"\n",["$","li",null,{"children":[["$","strong",null,{"children":"Composite score"}],": ",["$","code",null,{"children":"score = importance * recency * frequency"}]]}],"\n"]}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Consolidation Path",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L14",null,{}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["API Reference",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","$L13",null,{"language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"id":"$undefined","className":"group","children":["Performance",["$","a",null,{"href":"#undefined","className":"heading-anchor","children":"#"}]]}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"| Metric | Value |\n|--------|-------|\n| Median write | 15ms |\n| Median read | 8ms |\n| Median recall | 45ms |\n| Max capacity | 1,000 entries (default) |\n| Memory footprint | ~50MB per 1K entries |"}],"\n",["$","div",null,{"className":"callout callout-info","children":["$","div",null,{"className":"flex items-start mb-1","children":"Tip"}],["$","div",null,{"className":"text-sm leading-relaxed","children":["$","p",null,{"children":"Use high importance (0.8+) for critical facts you want promoted to Episodic Memory. Use low importance (0.2-) for transient observations that should be evicted quickly."}]}]]}]]}]}]]
